name: Decadent Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 10-inch tube pan.
2. Pour boiling water over chocolate and butter; let stand until melted. Stir in vanilla extract and sugar, then whisk in egg yolks one at a time until blended well.
3. Mix baking soda and sour cream and whisk into chocolate mixture.
4. Mix flour and baking powder well, and add to batter thoroughly.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry. Stir in 1/4 of the egg whites into the batter. Scoop remaining egg whites on top of the batter and gently fold in.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan. Set on middle rack of the oven and bake for 40-50 minutes or until edges have pulled away from pan and cake tester inserted comes out clean. Cool in pan for 10 minutes; unmold and cool completely before frosting.
Chocolate Frosting:
2 tablespoons Sweet butter
3/4 cup Semisweet chocolate chips
6 tablespoons Heavy cream
1 1/4 cups Confectioners' sugar
1 teaspoon Vanilla extract
Combine all ingredients in a heavy saucepan. Whisk until smooth over low heat. Cool slightly; add more sugar if necessary. Spread on cake while frosting is still warm.
